hero.title: Welcome to CP-Hub
hero.subtitle: The home of competitive programming at IIT Guwahati

intro.title: About the Coding Club
intro.body: The Coding Club at IIT Guwahati is a student-run community of competitive programmers, algorithm enthusiasts, and curious problem solvers. We organize contests, workshops, mock interviews and informal meet-ups throughout the year. Whether you are just starting out or you regularly grind ICPC and Codeforces rounds, there's a place for you here.

features.title: Contest Calendar
features.body: A live calendar pulling contests from every major platform.

features.title: Custom Leaderboards
features.body: Admins create club-specific leaderboards with custom scoring.

features.title: Events
features.body: Workshops, mock interviews, and club gatherings — all in one place.
